name: markdown-to-pdf
description: Convert Markdown files to professional PDF documents. No GTK3 dependency required. Supports Chinese language with optimized fonts.
author: Boss 学术加速器
usage: uv run python skills/markdown-to-pdf/convert-lite.py input.md output.pdf --title "Document Title"

examples.name: Basic Conversion
examples.command: uv run python convert-lite.py document.md document.pdf

examples.name: With Custom Title
examples.command: uv run python convert-lite.py input.md output.pdf --title "My Document"
